greeting: A visitor? Then the healer's message reached someone after all. Come closer — the guards change watch soon.
Don't pity me. I chose knowledge over silence, and Ashwick chose chains over truth.
You have the look of a pilgrim. Perhaps the Grail's road has led you here for a reason.
quest: Before my imprisonment, I hid a manuscript in the library — proof of Ashwick's treachery against the old lord. Retrieve it, and the people of Ravensgate will have cause to rise.
idle: The stones remember what men forget. This tower has held prisoners before Ashwick, and will after.
I count the days by the light through the arrow slit. Forty-seven, now.
